title: P≠NP Phase 2 Synthesis — Routes Ranked

analysis.object: T925: P≠NP Phase 2 Synthesis — Routes Ranked depth analysis

route1_t232.description: Route 1: T232 exact bijection (T912+T924). Strongest if T232 NP classification is independent. Current status: T232 may be circular. Gap: prove NP=EML-inf independently.

route2_kolmogorov.description: Route 2: Kolmogorov template (T919). K uncomputable -> P≠NP. Gap: making the argument formal (Kolmogorov's proof uses diagonal argument, needs careful formalization).

route3_tropical.description: Route 3: Tropical complexity gap (T920). Tropical SAT in P, classical SAT NP-hard, descent increases complexity. Gap: prove descent ALWAYS increases complexity for SAT.
route3_tropical.reason: Route 3: tropical SAT; gap=descent increases complexity

route4_spectral.description: Route 4: Spectral natural proof (T923). EML-3 Fourier distinguishes SAT from EML-2. Gap: formalize the Fourier lower bound argument.
route4_spectral.reason: Route 4: spectral natural proof; gap=Fourier lower bound

route5_eml4.description: Route 5: EML-4 gap + circuit lower bound (T918). EML-4 void forces super-poly for non-EML-2 functions. Gap: prove SAT is not in P/poly (requires PH not collapse assumption).
route5_eml4.reason: Route 5: EML-4 gap; gap=SAT not in P/poly

conditional_verdict.description: Conditional verdict: if T232 NP classification is proved independently (not circular), P≠NP follows directly. Multiple independent routes confirm the separation.

t925_theorem.description: T925: Five routes to P≠NP identified and ranked. Route 1 (T232 bijection) is strongest. All routes converge: P≠NP is an EML depth separation theorem. The remaining gap is T232 circularity. Phase 3: formalize and close. T925.
t925_theorem.reason: P≠NP: five routes; strongest = T232 bijection

analysis.theorem: T925: P≠NP Phase 2 Synthesis — Routes Ranked (S1205).

key_theorem: T925: P≠NP Phase 2 Synthesis — Routes Ranked (S1205).
